## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm format`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:docs`
- [ ] `pnpm test:inventory`
- [ ] `pnpm test:registry`
- [ ] `pnpm test:release-readiness`
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e`
- [ ] `pnpm test:storybook`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:package`
- [ ] `pnpm verify` for release candidates

## Optical Changes

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] `pnpm test:physics`
- [ ] `pnpm test:visual`
- [ ] `pnpm test:kube-reference:strict`

## Checklist

- [ ] Foreground content remains outside the displacement layer.
- [ ] Fallback and solid modes still work.
- [ ] Accessibility semantics are unchanged or improved.
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated.
- [ ] npm publish, Pages, and exact Kube parity are not claimed unless they have succeeded.
- [ ] Third-party references are attributed without copying source code.
